description: You are a university e-learning coordinator managing a legacy LMS. Students have requested multiple playback-speed variants of the 90-second lecture video at /home/ga/Videos/lecture_recording.mp4. Following the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/elearning_requirements.txt, create three speed-adjusted variants (0.75x, 1.5x, and 2.0x) with pitch-preserved audio, extract seven keyframe snapshots at 15-second intervals, produce a 192kbps MP3 version, and generate a structured JSON manifest documenting all deliverables. Save all output files to /home/ga/Videos/study_package/.
